prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次约8872→20786→11742→13972→15250名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2022年出现大幅下滑至20786名（可能受当年理科省控线 大幅提高影响），2023年迅速回升至11742名，此后两年持续后移，2025年基准约15250名，近2年累计后移约1278名；该校在黑龙江省理科（物理类）招生计划 ：2021年46人、2022年44人、2023年45人、2024年44人、2025年47人；2026年计划46人，较2025年减少1人，小幅缩招约2.1%，理论上使竞争略有加剧，但幅度极小。
3. 【学校层次】211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第92名（2021年第86名→2025年第88名→2026年第92名），近年排名略有下滑但仍属全国百强，师范类院校中位 列前茅。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2025年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及文学院教授公开羞辱求助学生的师德师风事件，可能对报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音综合热度排名 第100位（评价一般），短视频平台曝光量处于中后段，未出现明显高热信号；未见投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中仅外国语言文学获评A-，A类学科数量较少 （仅1个），与同层次师范类院校相比优势学科储备偏弱，对高分考生的吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业社会热度持续 偏高（2024年均为高热推荐/推荐），师范/教育类呈分化观望；黑龙江省2026年高考总人数约16.7万，物理类估算约11.4万人，较2025年减少约3000人（-2.7%），考生规模小幅 下降，竞争略有缓解；2026年；湖南师范大学位于湖南省长沙市，距黑龙江省较远，属于跨省招生；该校在本省（湖南）招生占比 约30%–35%，在黑龙江省招生占比约1%–2%（2025年约74人/全国约4000人），属于外省小规模招生，受地域偏好影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15250名、2026年 小幅缩招1人（竞争略加剧）、物理类考生减少约2.7%（竞争略缓解）、声誉偏负面等因素，供需弹性主值计算得15055名，结合考生规模下降的微弱利好修正，预测2026年最低位 次约15030名，区间14530–15530名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 8872 → 20786 → 11742 → 13972 → 15250, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2022, there was a significant drop to 20786 (possibly due to a substantial increase in the provincial control score for science that year), followed by a rapid recovery to 11742 in 2023, and then a continuous backward shift over the next two years, with a baseline of about 15250 in 2025, accumulating a backward shift of about 1278 positions in the last two years. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Heilongjiang Province: 46 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 45 in 2023, 44 in 2024, 47 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 46, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.1%, theoretically intensifying competition slightly, but the magnitude is minimal.
3. [School Level] 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking 92nd (86th in 2021 → 88th in 2025 → 92nd in 2026), with a slight decline in recent years but still among the top 100 nationally, ranking among the top in normal universities.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly involving an incident where a professor from the College of Literature publicly humiliated a student seeking help, which may have a certain negative impact on application psychology; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 100th (average evaluation), short video platform exposure in the middle to lower segment, no obvious high-heat signals; no record of file gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Foreign Language and Literature received an A-, with a small number of A-level disciplines (only 1), which is relatively weak compared to normal universities of the same level, limiting appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat (all were high-heat recommendations/recommended in 2024), while normal/education majors show differentiation and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, with an estimated 114,000 in the physics category, a decrease of about 3,000 (-2.7%) compared to 2025, a slight decrease in candidate scale, slightly easing competition; 2026; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, relatively far from Heilongjiang Province, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; the university's enrollment proportion in its own province (Hunan) is about 30%–35%, while in Heilongjiang Province it is about 1%–2% (about 74 people in 2025 out of about 4,000 nationally), belonging to small-scale enrollment in other provinces, less affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 15250, a slight reduction of 1 student in 2026 (competition slightly intensifies), a decrease of about 2.7% in physics category candidates (competition slightly eases), and a somewhat negative reputation, the main value of supply-demand elasticity is calculated as 15055. Combined with the weak positive correction of the decrease in candidate scale, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 15030, with a range of 14530–15530.

Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors (Accounting, Communication Engineering, Data Science, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Mathematics, Electronic Information, Software Engineering) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Finance, Law, Foreign Languages) as a safe backup. Candidates significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 14500) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates near the upper limit of the range (around 15500) are advised to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1722 → 1821 → 1580 → 2481 → 2112, showing a fluctuating trend. After reaching a recent best of 1580 in 2023, it dropped significantly to 2481 in 2024 (+901 positions), then slightly recovered to 2112 in 2025, with a cumulative decline of about 532 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 2112. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Heilongjiang Province: 28 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 29 in 2023, 30 in 2024, 27 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 28, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, a slight expansion of about 3.7%, theoretically leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 92nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, fluctuating between 86–92 in recent years, overall stable, belonging to the national top 100 normal universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to teacher ethics incidents), which may suppress some students' willingness to apply. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 100th (average evaluation), with short video exposure in the middle to lower segment. No record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Foreign Languages and Literature received an A- rating, with a relatively small number of A-level disciplines. Chinese Language and Literature (teacher training) corresponds to Chinese Language and Literature, which did not receive an A-level rating, limiting its appeal to high-scoring liberal arts students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature are socially recommended as relatively hot; Teacher Training/Education shows divergence and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in Heilongjiang Province is about 53,000, a decrease of about 2,000 from 2025 (-3.5%), with a slight decline in examinee scale, slightly easing competition. Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, far from Heilongjiang Province, and is a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion for liberal arts in Heilongjiang Province is very small (about 1%–2%), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2112, a slight enrollment expansion of 1 person in 2026 (competition slightly intensifies), a decrease of about 3.5% in history category examinees (competition slightly eases), and a somewhat negative reputation, the supply-demand elasticity main value calculates to 2159. Combined with the slight positive correction from the decline in examinee scale, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2179, with a range of 1679–2679.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 2179, range 1679–2679. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Accounting, Finance, Foreign Languages) as the main force, Tier 1 majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Ideological and Political Education) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Journalism and Communication, Business Administration) as a safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 1700), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the upper limit (around 2600), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors supplemented by Tier 2.
